title: SDAIA Generative AI Guidelines for Government
official_title: Generative AI Guidelines for Government Employees
citation: SDAIA, Generative AI Guidelines for Government Employees, January 2024
summary: Guidance for Saudi government entities and employees on adopting and using generative AI systems. It covers responsible use scenarios, challenges and ethical considerations, and practical controls, and was published alongside a parallel version for the general public.
impact_note: Government entities and their suppliers should treat these guidelines as the expected baseline for any generative AI use in the Saudi public sector, including disclosure of AI generated content, human review of outputs, and care with official or personal data in prompts. Vendors selling generative AI into government should align their offerings and contracts with the guidelines now, since they signal the direction of future binding controls and tie back to the AI Ethics Principles risk tiers.
notes: Exact publication day in January 2024 needs confirmation; replace the source link with the SDAIA document. The parallel public version should be added as its own record.
